name: FamilyWatchNight
description: Cross-platform desktop application to bring fun and safety to family movie nights.

scripts.build:main:raw: node scripts/generate-app-info.js && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && node scripts/copy-migrations.js
scripts.build:main:watch: node scripts/generate-app-info.js && node scripts/copy-migrations.js && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --watch
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:features
scripts.test:features: npm run build:main:for-integration-testing && cross-env NODE_ENV=test cucumber-js
scripts.test:features:browser: npm run build:main:for-integration-testing && cross-env NODE_ENV=test RENDER_LOCATION=browser cucumber-js
scripts.test:features:electron: npm run build:main:for-integration-testing && cross-env NODE_ENV=test RENDER_LOCATION=electron cucumber-js
scripts.test:features:headed: npm run build:main:for-integration-testing && cross-env NODE_ENV=test RENDER_LOCATION=browser HEADLESS=false cucumber-js
scripts.test:smoke: npm run build:main:for-integration-testing && cross-env NODE_ENV=test cucumber-js --profile smoke
scripts.test:component: npm run build:main:for-integration-testing && cross-env NODE_ENV=test cucumber-js --profile component
scripts.test:local: npm run clean && npm run build:renderer && npm run test:unit && npm run test:smoke
scripts.test:critical: npm run clean && npm run test:unit && npm run test:smoke
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --publish=onTag
scripts.dev: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer && concurrently "npm:build:main:watch" "npm:renderer:vite" "npm:electron:debug"
scripts.dev:test: npm run build:main:for-integration-testing && npm run build:renderer:for-integration-testing && concurrently "npm:build:main:watch" "npm:renderer:vite" "npm:electron:debug" "npm:watch:testing-active"
scripts.pack: npm run clean && npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --dir
